pages.title: Yesterday was Friday.
pages.image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22%3E%3Crect width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22 fill=%22%23f5f5f5%22/%3E%3C/svg%3E

pages.title: Yesterday, in the morning, Coco went to school.
Yesterday, in the morning, Coco went inside school with Daddy.
Yesterday, in the afternoon, Daddy picked Coco up from school.
Yesterday, in the afternoon, Coco went home.
The end.
pages.image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22%3E%3Crect width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22 fill=%22%23f5f5f5%22/%3E%3C/svg%3E

pages.title: Yesterday was Saturday
pages.image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22%3E%3Crect width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22 fill=%22%23f5f5f5%22/%3E%3C/svg%3E

pages.title: Yesterday, after lunch, Coco went to Vanderbilt Park.
Yesterday, at the park, Coco played with snow.
Yesterday, after the park, Coco ate dinner.
Yesterday, at night time, Coco went to sleep.
The end.
pages.image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22%3E%3Crect width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22 fill=%22%23f5f5f5%22/%3E%3C/svg%3E

pages.title: Today, Coco went to play basketball.
pages.image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22%3E%3Crect width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22 fill=%22%23f5f5f5%22/%3E%3C/svg%3E

pages.title: Then, Coco played with Matthew, Coco had fun.
Then we went home, but Coco wanted to play more basketball.
Then we played more, and Coco was happy.
At last, in the evening, Coco ate dinner. There was chicken and veggies.
The end.
pages.image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22%3E%3Crect width=%221600%22 height=%221200%22 fill=%22%23f5f5f5%22/%3E%3C/svg%3E
